briefdescription.para: IDelay Tap per lane for Rx Register.
Wakeup Timer for ULPS exit Register.
Watchdog timeout in HS mode Register.
Goto Stop state on timeout timer Register.
Clk lane PHY error Status Register.
Data lane 0 PHY error Status Register.
Data lane 1 PHY error Status Register.
Data lane 2 PHY error Status Register.
Data lane 3 PHY error Status Register.
IDelay Tap per lane for Rx 4-7 Register.
Data lane 0 PHY error Status Register.
Data lane 1 PHY error Status Register.
Data lane 2 PHY error Status Register.
Data lane 3 PHY error Status Register.

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XDPHY_CTRL_REG_OFFSET register

description.para: This register is used for the enabling/disabling and resetting the DPHY

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XDPHY_HSEXIT_IDELAY_REG_OFFSET register

description.para: This register in RX mode acts like IDELAY.
In IDELAY mode, it is used to calibrate input delay per lane

briefdescription.para: used to set the IDELAY TAP value for all lanes

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XDPHY_INIT_REG_OFFSET register

description.para: This register is used for lane Initialization.
Recommended to use 1ms or longer in for TX mode and 200us-500us for RX mode

sectiondef.header: Bitmask and offset of XDPHY_WAKEUP_REG_OFFSET register

description.para: Wakeup time delay for ULPS exit.

sectiondef.header: Bitmask and offset of XDPHY_HSTIMEOUT_REG_OFFSET register

description.para: This register is used to program watchdog timer in high speed mode.

sectiondef.header: Bitmask and offset of XDPHY_ESCTIMEOUT_REG_OFFSET register

description.para: This register contains Rx Data Lanes timeout for watchdog timer in escape mode.

sectiondef.header: Bitmask and offset of XDPHY_CLSTATUS_REG_OFFSET register

description.para: This register contains the clock lane status and state machine control.

briefdescription.para: Bitmask combining all clock lane status flags: error control, stop state, initialization done, ULPS mode, and mode bits.
Bit offset for Control Error on Clock.
Bit offset for Stop State on Clock.

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and offsets of XDPHY_DLxSTATUS_REG_OFFSET register

description.para: This register contains the data lanes status

briefdescription.para: Set on Data Lane Esc timeout occurs.
Set on Data Lane HS timeout.
Set when DPHY in ULPS mode.
Control Mode (Esc, Low, High) of Data Lane.

memberdef.name: XDPHY_DLXSTATUS_ALLMASK
memberdef.initializer: (XDPHY_DLXSTATUS_REG_MODE_MASK |\ XDPHY_DLXSTATUS_REG_ULPS_MASK |\ XDPHY_DLXSTATUS_REG_INITDONE_MASK |\ XDPHY_DLXSTATUS_REG_HSABRT_MASK |\ XDPHY_DLXSTATUS_REG_ESCABRT_MASK |\ XDPHY_DLXSTATUS_REG_STOP_MASK |\ XDPHY_DLXSTATUS_REG_CALIB_STATUS_MASK |\ XDPHY_DLXSTATUS_REG_CALIB_COMPLETE_MASK)

briefdescription.para: Bitmask combining all data lane status flags: mode, ULPS, init done, HS abort, escape abort, stop state, calibration status and complete.
Bit offset for High Speed Abort.

sectiondef.header: Bitmask and offset of XDPHY_HSSETTLE_REG_OFFSET register

description.para: This register is used to program the HS SETTLE register.

briefdescription.para: Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros.
Offset value for data lane registers.
This function reads a value from a DPHY register space.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit read is performed. If the component is implemented in a smaller width, only the least significant data is read from the register. The most significant data will be read as 0.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the XCsiSs core instance.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file).

briefdescription.para: This function writes a value to a DPHY register space A 32 bit write is performed.

detaileddescription.para: If the component is implemented in a smaller width, only the least significant data is written.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the XCsiSs core instance.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file) to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write into the register.
